Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Tim Miller. Author, maintainer.

  • Brian Stock. Author.

  • Liz Brooks. Contributor.

  • Chris Legault. Contributor.

  • Jim Thorson. Contributor.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Miller, T.J. and Stock, B.C. 2020. The Woods Hole Assessment Model (WHAM). Version 1.0. https://timjmiller.github.io/wham/.

  title = {The {W}oods {H}ole {A}ssessment {M}odel ({WHAM})},
